name: Chicken Mole with Coffee Extract
recipeIngredient: 1 cup plus 1 tablespoon coffee syrup (from previous recipe)
1 cup pistachios, shelled and toasted, plus extra for garnish
1 poblano pepper, roasted, peeled and chopped
3 tablespoons chopped cilantro leaves, plus extra for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate chicken breasts in 1 cup of coffee syrup for several hours or overnight.
2. Preheat a grill or broiler.
3. In a saucepan, combine the remaining 1 tablespoon coffee syrup with pistachios, poblano pepper, onion, cilantro leaves, bittersweet chocolate, garlic, chili powder, cumin, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Puree the sauce using an immersion blender or transfer to a blender/food processor and puree.
6. Strain the sauce into a clean saucepan.
7. Whisk in cream and adjust seasonings to taste.
8. Grill or broil chicken, turning once, until well-browned, about 8 minutes total.
9. Top each chicken breast with sauce and garnish with pistachios and cilantro leaves.
10. Yield: 2 servings
